facebook.caption:
POV: you wandered down Hoàng Văn Thụ and found Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao before anyone else on your trip did.

4.9 stars. 31 reviews. A coffee shop that earns that rating the quiet way.

No tourist trail leads here. You find it by walking, then you come back the next morning.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Tiệm Cà Phê Đồng Giao at 38 Hoàng Văn Thụ. 4.9 stars. The locals already know. Now you do too. Save the address.
